data.body: Fixed: added test_shadow_sg_rejected_by_discriminator to test-record-test-status-centrality.sh. Creates a fake sg binary that mimics shadow-utils' sg behavior (exits non-zero, no version output matching the ast-grep pattern), prepends it to PATH, and verifies the hook correctly warns about unavailable centrality scoring and still writes a valid status file. Test passes GREEN: the existing _is_astgrep_sg discriminator correctly rejects the shadow-utils sg (its grep check for '^(sg|ast-grep) [0-9]' fails on empty stdout from the fake sg).
